body_txt: One or more heroes are put through a False Crucible , without any warning they're being tested. This is particularly popular with Trickster Mentors .   When the hero initially knew they were being tested, but is falsely told the test has ended, it's a Training "Accident" (military) or The Game Never Stopped (civilian). Either way, the hero ends up thinking they're facing a real situation, with no idea it's still just a test.
